Genuine background\\n   * output arriving after this window still flushes normally.\\n   */\\n  _orphanSuppressUntil?: number;\\n  /**\\n   * Internal: the archive loaded from the PREVIOUS session at create time\\n   * (already consumed/deleted from disk on inject). Stashed so that if THIS\\n   * session turns out trivial (< config.archiveMinTurns), archiveOnClose can\\n   * carry the prior, more-substantive archive forward instead of clobbering it\\n   * with a throwaway one. undefined if there was no prior archive.\\n   */\\n  priorArchive?: SessionArchive;\\n}\\n\\nexport class SessionManager {\\n  private sessions = new Map<number, ChatSession>();\\n  private sweeper: NodeJS.Timeout;\\n  /**\\n   * Per-chat ACP backend selection (/agent). Lives OUTSIDE the session so a\\n   * crash-recreate via get() respawns the chosen backend instead of silently\\n   * reverting to the .env default. Cleared only by an explicit switch; lost\\n   * Persisted to ${MEMORY_DIR}/config/pinned-agent.json so /agent choice\\n   * survives bridge restart.\\n   */\\n  private acpBackendByChat = new Map<number, string>();\\n  /** Per-chat: messages with date <= this value are silently dropped. */\\n  private _dropBefore = new Map<number, number>();\\n  /** Called before a session's agent is closed. Used for memory extraction. */\\n  public onBeforeClose?: (session: ChatSession) => Promise<void>;\\n  /** Called when the agent exits unexpectedly (crash, kill). Best-effort persistence only. */\\n  public onUnexpectedExit?: (session: ChatSession, code: number | null) => Promise<void>;\\n  /**\\n   * Called when an orphan turn (agent output produced with no active prompt\\n   * turn) quiesces. Wired in index.ts to the run-prompt flusher so orphan\\n   * delivery reuses the SAME reply transform / render / token path as the\\n   * normal request→response flow. `text` is the raw accumulated buffer.\\n   */\\n  public onOrphanTurn?: (session: ChatSession, text: string) => void | Promise<void>;\\n\\n  constructor() {\\n    this.sweeper = setInterval(() => this.sweepIdle(), 60_000);\\n    this.sweeper.unref?.();\\n    // Fire-and-forget: load persisted /agent choices. If the file doesn't\\n    // exist or is corrupt we just start fresh (same as before).\\n    loadPinnedAgents().then((map) => {\\n      for (const [k, v] of map) {\\n        if (!this.acpBackendByChat.has(k)) this.acpBackendByChat.set(k, v);\\n      }\\n    }).catch(() => {});\\n  }\\n\\n  async get(chatId: number, userId?: number): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing && !existing.client.isClosed) {\\n      existing.lastUsed = Date.now();\\n      return existing;\\n    }\\n    return this.create(chatId, userId);\\n  }\\n\\n  private async create(chatId: number, userId?: number, providerType?: ProviderType): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    // Inject TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID so MCP children (mcp-memory) know whose\\n    // facts file to write. MEMORY_DIR is passed through too so the mcp\\n    // server doesn't need to re-read .env.\\n    const env: Record<string, string> = { MEMORY_DIR: config.memoryDir };\\n    if (userId) env.TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID = String(userId);\\n\\n    const activeType = providerType ?? config.defaultProvider;\\n\\n    // Resolve the pinned ACP backend (/agent). Looked up on EVERY create —\\n    // including crash-recreates via get() — so the chosen backend sticks.\\n    let backend: AcpBackendDef | undefined;\\n    if (activeType === \\\"acp\\\") {\\n      const key = this.acpBackendByChat.get(chatId);\\n      if (key) {\\n        backend = loadAcpProviders()[key];\\n        if (!backend) {\\n          console.warn(\\n            `[session ${chatId}] pinned ACP backend \\\"${key}\\\" not in acp-providers.json — falling back to .env agent`,\\n          );\\n          this.acpBackendByChat.delete(chatId);\\n          savePinnedAgents(this.acpBackendByChat).catch(() => {});\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    const facts = userId ? await loadFacts(userId) : \\\"\\\";\\n\\n    // Try to compress recent facts via local LLM (graceful fallback if unavailable)\\n    let compressed: string | null = null;\\n    if (facts && activeType !== \\\"local\\\") {\\n      const lines = facts.split(/\\\\r?\\\\n/).filter(l => l.trim().length > 0);\\n      const tail = config.memoryPreambleTail;\\n      if (lines.length > tail) {\\n        const { compressFactsForPreamble: compress } = await import(\\\"./local-llm.js\\\");\\n        compressed = await compress(lines.slice(-tail));\\n      }\\n    }\\n    const breakdown = activeType === \\\"local\\\"\\n      ? buildLocalPreamble(facts, userId)\\n      : buildPreambleWithBreakdown(facts, userId, { compressed, agentCommand: backend?.command });\\n\\n    // Inject working-state from previous session if available (one-shot).\\n    const wsPath = path.join(config.memoryDir, `working-state-${chatId}.md`);\\n    let workingStateBlock = \\\"\\\";\\n    try {\\n      const ws = await readFile(wsPath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n      workingStateBlock =\\n        \\\"\\\\n[Previous session working state — use as context to resume work]\\\\n\\\" +\\n        ws +\\n        \\\"\\\\nResume from `next_action` above. Do not ask what was done last time.\\\\n\\\" +\\n        \\\"[End working state]\\\\n\\\\n\\\";\\n      await unlink(wsPath);\\n      console.log(`[session] injected working-state for chat ${chatId}`);\\n    } catch { /* file doesn't exist — normal */ }\\n\\n    // Inject structured session archive restoration (complements working-state\\n    // with turn-level context, goal state, and session stats).\\n    let archiveBlock = \\\"\\\";\\n    let priorArchive: SessionArchive | undefined;\\n    try {\\n      const { loadArchive, buildRestorationBlock, deleteArchive, isArchiveStale } = await import(\\\"./session-archive.js\\\");\\n      const archive = await loadArchive(chatId);\\n      if (archive) {\\n        if (isArchiveStale(archive, config.archiveMaxAgeHours, Date.now())) {\\n          const ageH = Math.round((Date.now() - new Date(archive.archivedAt).getTime()) / 3600_000);\\n          // Too old to be a useful handoff. Drop it AND leave priorArchive\\n          // undefined so a trivial close doesn't carry this stale archive\\n          // forward yet again (the root cause of \\\"老是看到很之前的 session\\\").\\n          await deleteArchive(chatId);\\n          console.log(`[session] discarded stale archive for chat ${chatId} (age ${ageH}h > ${config.archiveMaxAgeHours}h)`);\\n        } else {\\n          archiveBlock = \\\"\\\\n\\\" + buildRestorationBlock(archive) + \\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\";\\n          await deleteArchive(chatId);\\n          priorArchive = archive; // stash for trivial-session carry-forward on close\\n          console.log(`[session] injected session archive for chat ${chatId} (${archive.stats.turnCount} turns, closed=${archive.closeReason})`);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.error(`[session] loadArchive failed for chat ${chatId}:`, (err as Error).message);\\n    }\\n\\n    // Inject pending dream suggestions (High Priority from last /dream run).\\n    // Read-only：STATE.md 由 dream 每晚重寫，這裡不刪。48h 新鮮度閘門防止\\n    // 注入陳年建議。Frozen-snapshot 合規：只在 create() 組一次，隨 preamble 凍結。\\n    let dreamStateBlock = \\\"\\\";\\n    try {\\n      const { readLoopStateHighPriority, loopStatePath } = await import(\\\"./loop-state.js\\\");\\n      const hp = readLoopStateHighPriority();\\n      const fresh = hp?.lastRun && Date.now() - hp.lastRun.getTime() < 48 * 3600_000;\\n      if (hp && fresh && hp.items.length > 0) {\\n        dreamStateBlock =\\n          \\\"\\\\n[Pending dream suggestions — 上次 /dream 維運的 High Priority 待辦]\\\\n\\\" +\\n          hp.items.map((it) => `- ${it}`).join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") +\\n          \\\"\\\\n當使用者說「處理建議」「dream 建議」或類似語句時，即指上述項目。\\\\n\\\" +\\n          `完整三層清單（含 Watch List）在 ${loopStatePath()}。處理完某項後，更新該檔移除或標記已處理。\\\\n` +\\n          \\\"[End pending dream suggestions]\\\\n\\\\n\\\";\\n        console.log(`[session] injected ${hp.items.length} pending dream suggestion(s) for chat ${chatId}`);\\n      }\\n    } catch { /* fail-open：STATE.md 缺失或格式不符不影響 session 建立 */ }\\n\\n    const relayTaskBlock = await formatActiveRelayTasksForPreamble(chatId);\\n    const preambleText = breakdown.text + workingStateBlock + archiveBlock + dreamStateBlock + relayTaskBlock;\\n    const agentCommand = backend?.command ?? config.agent.command;\\n    const resumeSessionId = activeType === \\\"acp\\\"\\n      ? await resolveResumeCandidate(chatId, backend, agentCommand)\\n      : undefined;\\n    const provider = this.createProvider(activeType, env, preambleText, backend, resumeSessionId);\\n    const session: ChatSession = {\\n      chatId,\\n      userId,\\n      client: provider,\\n      activeProvider: activeType,\\n      acpBackend: backend?.key,\\n      sessionId: \\\"\\\",\\n      lastUsed: Date.now(),\\n      buffer: \\\"\\\",\\n      toolLog: [],\\n      toolTimeline: [],\\n      stderrTail: \\\"\\\",\\n      history: [],\\n      charsIn: 0,\\n      charsOut: 0,\\n      memoryPreamble: preambleText,\\n      preambleBreakdown: {\\n        total: preambleText.length,\\n        toolNotes: breakdown.toolNotes,\\n        envBlock: breakdown.envBlock,\\n        memoryBlock: breakdown.memoryBlock,\\n        dailylogBlock: breakdown.dailylogBlock,\\n      },\\n      preambleInjected: activeType !== \\\"acp\\\" ? true : false, // Direct providers use system message; ACP needs user-message injection\\n      tailFacts: breakdown.tailFacts,\\n      injectedWikiSlugs: new Set(),\\n      injectedSkills: new Set(),\\n      inflight: false,\\n      _pendingMetaQueue: [],\\n      _consecutiveToolFails: 0,\\n      priorArchive,\\n    };\\n\\n    provider.on(\\\"update\\\", (u: SessionUpdate) => this.applyUpdate(session, u));\\n    provider.on(\\\"stderr\\\", (chunk) => {\\n      // Keep the tail so we can surface it with error messages.\\n      session.stderrTail = (session.stderrTail + chunk).slice(-2000);\\n      // Surface only when debugging; keep quiet otherwise.\\n      if (process.env.DEBUG_ACP) {\\n        console.error(`[acp ${chatId}] ${chunk.trimEnd()}`);\\n      }\\n    });\\n    provider.on(\\\"exit\\\", (code) => {\\n      console.error(`[acp ${chatId}] agent exited (code=${code})`);\\n      // Only fire the unexpected-exit hook if this session is still registered.\\n      // Planned shutdowns (drop/sweepIdle/shutdown) remove it from the map first.\\n      const stillRegistered = this.sessions.get(chatId) === session;\\n      if (stillRegistered) {\\n        this.sessions.delete(chatId);\\n        if (this.onUnexpectedExit) {\\n          this.onUnexpectedExit(session, code).catch((e) =>\\n            console.error(`[session ${chatId}] onUnexpectedExit failed:`, e),\\n          );\\n        }\\n      }\\n    });\\n\\n    session.sessionId = await provider.initialize();\\n\\n    // Resume 成功：context 已在 agent session 內 —— 丟棄本次組好的 preamble\\n    // （不重注，避免雙份）。archive/working-state 已在上方組 preamble 時消費\\n    // 刪除（BC-5 剛好由既有消費點滿足）。breakdown 歸零讓 /context 如實顯示。\\n    const resumed = activeType === \\\"acp\\\" && provider instanceof AcpProvider && provider.resumed;\\n    if (resumed) {\\n      session.memoryPreamble = \\\"\\\";\\n      session.preambleInjected = true;\\n      session.preambleBreakdown = { total: 0, toolNotes: 0, envBlock: 0, memoryBlock: 0, dailylogBlock: 0 };\\n      session.resumed = true;\\n      console.log(`[session ${chatId}] resumed ACP session ${session.sessionId}`);\\n    }\\n    // Registry 生命週期：flag on 時記錄本 session（bridge 整個 crash 也能恢復）\\n    if (config.acpSessionResume && activeType === \\\"acp\\\") {\\n      saveResumable(chatId, {\\n        sessionId: session.sessionId,\\n        backendKey: backend?.key ?? \\\"\\\",\\n        agentCommand,\\n        cwd: config.sessionCwd,\\n        savedAt: Date.now(),\\n      }).catch((err) => console.warn(`[session ${chatId}] saveResumable failed:`, err));\\n    }\\n\\n    this.sessions.set(chatId, session);\\n    logEvent(\\\"session_start\\\", { provider: activeType, backend: backend?.key, sessionId: session.sessionId, resumed }, { chatId, userId });\\n    return session;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Factory: create the right Provider based on type. */\\n  private createProvider(type: ProviderType, env: Record<string, string>, systemPrompt?: string, backend?: AcpBackendDef, resumeSessionId?: string): Provider {\\n    if (type === \\\"acp\\\") {\\n      // With a pinned backend (/agent), its table entry replaces the .env\\n      // agent wholesale — including the model/effort pin (undefined = leave\\n      // the adapter's own default untouched, NOT fall back to .env's pin).\\n      return new AcpProvider({\\n        command: backend?.command ?? config.agent.command,\\n        args: backend?.args ?? config.agent.args,\\n        cwd: config.sessionCwd,\\n        env,\\n        promptRetries: config.acpPromptRetries,\\n        promptRetryBaseMs: config.acpPromptRetryBaseMs,\\n        acpModel: backend ? (backend.model ?? \\\"\\\") : config.acpModel,\\n        acpEffort: backend ? (backend.effort ?? \\\"\\\") : config.acpEffort,\\n        sessionCwd: config.sessionCwd,\\n        resumeSessionId,\\n      });\\n    }\\n    // All other types use DirectProvider\\n    const modelKey = type as keyof typeof config.models;\\n    const apiKeyKey = type as keyof typeof config.apiKeys;\\n    return new DirectProvider({\\n      type,\\n      model: config.models[modelKey] ?? config.models.local,\\n      baseUrl: resolveBaseUrl(type, config.ollamaUrl),\\n      apiKey: config.apiKeys[apiKeyKey] ?? \\\"\\\",\\n      systemPrompt,\\n      mcpEnv: env,\\n      // Local models have limited context — keep the server set focused.\\n      mcpServerFilter: type === \\\"local\\\" ? [\\\"memory\\\", \\\"notebooklm\\\", \\\"google\\\"] : undefined,\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Switch the active provider for a chat. Closes the old session and\\n   * creates a new one with the specified provider type.\\n   * Returns the new session.\\n   */\\n  async switchProvider(chatId: number, type: ProviderType, userId?: number): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing) {\\n      this.sessions.delete(chatId);\\n      await existing.client.close().catch(() => {});\\n    }\\n    return this.create(chatId, userId, type);\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Switch the ACP backend for a chat (/agent) with conversation handoff.\\n   * Reuses the full drop() close pipeline — archiveOnClose (substantive\\n   * guard + priorArchive carry-forward + LLM summary), onBeforeClose\\n   * (transcript + working-state) — so the new session's create() finds the\\n   * archive on disk and injects the handoff context into its preamble.\\n   * Throws when the backend key is unknown or a turn is in flight.\\n   */\\n  async switchAgent(chatId: number, backendKey: string, userId?: number): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const def = loadAcpProviders()[backendKey];\\n    if (!def) {\\n      throw new Error(`未知的 agent \\\"${backendKey}\\\"（不在 acp-providers.json）`);\\n    }\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing?.inflight) {\\n      throw new Error(\\\"目前有 turn 進行中，請等它完成或先 /cancel 再切換\\\");\\n    }\\n    if (existing) {\\n      await this.drop(chatId, \\\"agent_switch\\\");\\n    }\\n    this.acpBackendByChat.set(chatId, backendKey);\\n    savePinnedAgents(this.acpBackendByChat).catch((err) =>\\n      console.warn(`[session ${chatId}] failed to persist pinned agent:`, err),\\n    );\\n    return this.create(chatId, userId, \\\"acp\\\");\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Start (or restart) the inactivity timer for a turn. */\\n  startInactivityTimer(session: ChatSession) {\\n    this.clearInactivityTimer(session);\\n    const ms = session._toolInFlight && config.turnToolInactivityTimeoutMs > 0\\n      ? config.turnToolInactivityTimeoutMs\\n      : config.turnInactivityTimeoutMs;\\n    if (ms <= 0) return;\\n    session._inactivityTimer = setTimeout(() => {\\n      console.warn(\\n        `[session ${session.chatId}] turn inactivity timeout (${ms}ms, toolInFlight=${!!session._toolInFlight}) — auto-cancelling`,\\n      );\\n      session.client.cancel();\\n    }, ms);\\n    session._inactivityTimer.unref?.();\\n  }\\n\\n  private resetInactivityTimer(session: ChatSession) {\\n    if (!session._inactivityTimer) return;\\n    this.startInactivityTimer(session);\\n  }\\n\\n  clearInactivityTimer(session: ChatSession) {\\n    if (session._inactivityTimer) {\\n      clearTimeout(session._inactivityTimer);\\n      session._inactivityTimer = undefined;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  private applyUpdate(session: ChatSession, u: SessionUpdate) {\\n    this.resetInactivityTimer(session);\\n    const up = u.update;\\n    // Opportunistically capture usage-like meta the agent may attach.\\n    const meta = (up as { _meta?: Record<string, unknown> })._meta;\\n    const usage =\\n      (meta?.usage as Record<string, unknown> | undefined) ??\\n      ((up as { usage?: Record<string, unknown> }).usage);\\n    if (usage && typeof usage === \\\"object\\\") {\\n      session.usage = usage;\\n    }\\n    switch (up.sessionUpdate) {\\n      case \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\":\\n      case \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\": {\\n        const content = up.content as { type?: string; text?: string } | undefined;\\n        if (content?.type === \\\"text\\\" && typeof content.text === \\\"string\\\") {\\n          // Orphan turn: a message chunk arrived with no prompt turn in-flight\\n          // (typically a background sub-agent completion re-invoking the agent\\n          // via task-notification). The normal request→response flush path in\\n          // runPrompt isn't listening, so route it to the debounced orphan\\n          // flusher instead of the live-turn buffer. Thought chunks are never\\n          // user-facing, so only real message chunks take this path.\\n          if (up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\" && !session.inflight) {\\n            this.appendOrphan(session, content.text);\\n            break;\\n          }\\n          const wasEmpty = session.buffer.length === 0 && !session.thinkingBuffer;\\n          if (up.sessionUpdate === \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\") {\\n            session.thinkingBuffer = (session.thinkingBuffer || \\\"\\\") + content.text;\\n          } else {\\n            session.buffer += content.text;\\n            session.charsOut += content.text.length;\\n          }\\n          if (wasEmpty) petState(\\\"streaming\\\");\\n          // Early-capture RELAY_DELEGATE tokens during streaming.\\n          // Workaround: Kiro CLI may strip <<...>> from final text in pure-text turns,\\n          // but streaming chunks arrive unfiltered. We capture complete tokens here\\n          // so the final-render path can fall back to them if normal extraction finds nothing.\\n          // Inline/fenced code examples must stay inert, matching final token extraction.\\n          const captured = captureRelayDelegateTokensFromText(session.buffer, session._streamingDelegates ?? []);\\n          session._streamingDelegates = captured.length ? captured : undefined;\\n          session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        }\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      case \\\"tool_call\\\": {\\n        const title = (up.title as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n        const startId = up.toolCallId as string | undefined;\\n        if (startId) (session._toolTitles ??= new Map()).set(startId, title);\\n        session.toolTimeline.push({\\n          id: startId ?? `__auto_${session.toolTimeline.length}`,\\n          name: title,\\n          status: \\\"running\\\",\\n          startedAt: Date.now(),\\n        });\\n        // Tier A precedingTools 唯一 push 維護點（避免 tool_call+update 兩處重複計數）。\\n        session._recentToolNames = appendToolName(session._recentToolNames ?? [], title);\\n        session._toolInFlight = true;\\n        petState(\\\"tool\\\", title);\\n        session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      case \\\"tool_call_update\\\": {\\n        const status = up.status as string | undefined;\\n        const updId = up.toolCallId as string | undefined;\\n        // tool_call_update 只帶 opaque toolCallId、不帶 name。用 tool_call 起始時\\n        // 綁定的 title 解析工具名；退而用 inline title，再退用 \\\"tool\\\"。\\n        const toolName =\\n          (updId ? session._toolTitles?.get(updId) : undefined) ??\\n          (up.title as string) ??\\n          \\\"tool\\\";\\n        if (status === \\\"completed\\\") {\\n          markToolDone(session, updId, \\\"completed\\\");\\n          // A success clears any stale reflexion hint (fail streak is over).\\n          if (session.toolLog.length) session.toolLog = [];\\n          session._toolInFlight = false;\\n          session._consecutiveToolFails = 0;\\n          logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\", { name: toolName, status: \\\"completed\\\" }, { chatId: session.chatId });\\n          // Tier A seq observation：僅 ACP 路徑（Direct 由 tool-loop 的 Tier B rich 接手，避免雙記 BC-1）。\\n          // slice(0,-1) 排除「當前工具自身」（tool_call 已先 push title），對齊 rich 的「preceding 不含本 tool」語意。\\n          if (session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\") {\\n            recordSeqObservation({\\n              name: toolName,\\n              status: \\\"completed\\\",\\n              sessionId: session.sessionId,\\n              chatId: session.chatId,\\n              precedingTools: (session._recentToolNames ?? []).slice(0, -1),\\n            });\\n          }\\n          if (updId) session._toolTitles?.delete(updId);\\n          session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        } else if (status === \\\"failed\\\") {\\n          markToolDone(session, updId, \\\"failed\\\");\\n          session._toolInFlight = false;\\n          session._consecutiveToolFails++;\\n          logEvent(\\\"tool_call\\\", { name: toolName, status: \\\"failed\\\" }, { chatId: session.chatId });\\n          // Tier A seq observation：僅 ACP 路徑（Direct 失敗 tool 由 tool-loop catch 分支寫 rich）。\\n          if (session.activeProvider === \\\"acp\\\") {\\n            recordSeqObservation({\\n              name: toolName,\\n              status: \\\"failed\\\",\\n              sessionId: session.sessionId,\\n              chatId: session.chatId,\\n              precedingTools: (session._recentToolNames ?? []).slice(0, -1),\\n            });\\n          }\\n          if (updId) session._toolTitles?.delete(updId);\\n          if (session._consecutiveToolFails >= 2) {\\n            session.toolLog.push(\\n              `⚠️ [Reflexion hint] ${session._consecutiveToolFails} consecutive tool failures. ` +\\n              `STOP and diagnose: what assumption is wrong? Try a different approach.`\\n            );\\n          }\\n          session.onUpdate?.(session);\\n        }\\n        break;\\n      }\\n      default:\\n        // Ignore plan/user_message_chunk/etc. for the bridge.\\n        break;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Buffer an orphan-turn message chunk and (re)arm the quiescence timer.\\n   * Each new chunk pushes the flush out by orphanFlushQuiescenceMs so a\\n   * multi-chunk background summary is delivered as one message once the\\n   * agent goes quiet. No-op if the flusher is disabled (quiescence 0).\\n   */\\n  private appendOrphan(session: ChatSession, text: string) {\\n    if (config.orphanFlushQuiescenceMs <= 0) return;\\n    if (session._orphanSuppressUntil && Date.now() < session._orphanSuppressUntil) return;\\n    session._orphanBuffer = (session._orphanBuffer || \\\"\\\") + text;\\n    session.charsOut += text.length;\\n    if (session._orphanFlushTimer) clearTimeout(session._orphanFlushTimer);\\n    session._orphanFlushTimer = setTimeout(() => {\\n      session._orphanFlushTimer = undefined;\\n      this.flushOrphan(session);\\n    }, config.orphanFlushQuiescenceMs);\\n    session._orphanFlushTimer.unref?.();\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Flush any buffered orphan-turn text immediately. Fired by the quiescence\\n   * timer, and eagerly at the start of a new live turn (resetTurn) so orphan\\n   * output never interleaves with the live turn's streaming placeholder.\\n   * Delivery itself is delegated to `onOrphanTurn` (run-prompt flusher).\\n   */\\n  flushOrphan(session: ChatSession) {\\n    if (session._orphanFlushTimer) {\\n      clearTimeout(session._orphanFlushTimer);\\n      session._orphanFlushTimer = undefined;\\n    }\\n    const text = (session._orphanBuffer || \\\"\\\").trim();\\n    session._orphanBuffer = undefined;\\n    if (!text) return;\\n    if (!this.onOrphanTurn) {\\n      console.warn(\\n        `[orphan ${session.chatId}] buffered ${text.length} chars but no onOrphanTurn handler wired — dropping`,\\n      );\\n      return;\\n    }\\n    console.log(`[orphan ${session.chatId}] flushing orphan turn (${text.length} chars)`);\\n    logEvent(\\\"orphan_flush\\\", { chars: text.length }, { chatId: session.chatId, userId: session.userId });\\n    Promise.resolve(this.onOrphanTurn(session, text)).catch((err) =>\\n      console.error(`[orphan ${session.chatId}] onOrphanTurn failed:`, err),\\n    );\\n  }\\n\\n  resetTurn(session: ChatSession) {\\n    // Flush any pending orphan output before a new live turn clears the\\n    // buffers, so background continuation isn't lost or interleaved with the\\n    // upcoming turn's streaming placeholder.\\n    if (session._orphanBuffer || session._orphanFlushTimer) this.flushOrphan(session);\\n    session._orphanSuppressUntil = undefined;\\n    session._cancelledTurn = false;\\n    session.buffer = \\\"\\\";\\n    session.thinkingBuffer = undefined;\\n    session.toolLog = [];\\n    session.toolTimeline = [];\\n    session.stderrTail = \\\"\\\";\\n    session._toolInFlight = false;\\n    session._streamingDelegates = undefined;\\n    session._toolTitles?.clear();\\n    // push turn 邊界 marker 但「不清空」_recentToolNames——硬清空會讓每 turn 第一個\\n    // tool 的 precedingTools 永遠空；marker 讓下游 analyzer 自己切斷跨 turn combo。\\n    if (session._recentToolNames?.length) {\\n      session._recentToolNames = appendToolName(session._recentToolNames, TURN_MARKER);\\n    }\\n    this.startInactivityTimer(session);\\n  }\\n\\n  cancel(chatId: number) {\\n    const s = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (!s) return;\\n    s.client.cancel();\\n\\n    // Optimistic cancel: immediately free the session so the user can send\\n    // new messages without waiting for the CLI to acknowledge cancellation.\\n    s._cancelledTurn = true;\\n    s.inflight = false;\\n    s._toolInFlight = false;\\n    s.onUpdate = undefined;\\n    this.clearInactivityTimer(s);\\n    // Drop any orphan capture in progress: after cancel, inflight=false means\\n    // trailing chunks from the cancelled turn would flip to the orphan path.\\n    // A cancel means \\\"stop, I don't want this\\\" — discard rather than flush\\n    // abandoned partial output. Genuine later background output re-arms fresh.\\n    if (s._orphanFlushTimer) { clearTimeout(s._orphanFlushTimer); s._orphanFlushTimer = undefined; }\\n    s._orphanBuffer = undefined;\\n    // Suppress capture across the force-kill window so trailing chunks don't leak.\\n    s._orphanSuppressUntil = Date.now() + 20_000;\\n\\n    // Force-kill escalation: if CLI doesn't exit the turn within 15s,\\n    // kill the process tree and re-create on next message.\\n    if (!s.client.isClosed) {\\n      const timer = setTimeout(async () => {\\n        if (s.client.isClosed) return;\\n        console.warn(`[cancel] chat ${chatId} CLI still alive after 15s — force-killing`);\\n        await s.client.close();\\n      }, 15_000);\\n      timer.unref?.();\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Enable drop-all mode: silently discard messages sent before now. */\\n  enableDropAll(chatId: number) { this._dropBefore.set(chatId, Math.floor(Date.now() / 1000)); }\\n  /** Disable drop-all mode. */\\n  disableDropAll(chatId: number) { this._dropBefore.delete(chatId); }\\n  /** Check if a message should be dropped (sent before the cutoff). */\\n  shouldDrop(chatId: number, messageDate: number): boolean {\\n    const cutoff = this._dropBefore.get(chatId);\\n    if (!cutoff) return false;\\n    if (messageDate <= cutoff) return true;\\n    // Message is newer than cutoff — auto-clear and let it through\\n    this._dropBefore.delete(chatId);\\n    return false;\\n  }\\n\\n  peek(chatId: number): ChatSession | undefined {\\n    return this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n  }\\n\\n  size(): number {\\n    return this.sessions.size;\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Persist a closing session's archive, or carry the prior archive forward.\\n   *\\n   * A \\\"substantive\\\" close (>= config.archiveMinTurns turns with some assistant\\n   * output) is exported — including a close-time LLM summary — and saved. A\\n   * trivial close does NOT overwrite a more-substantive prior archive: the\\n   * stashed priorArchive is re-saved so the real work's context survives to the\\n   * next session. exportSession itself skips the LLM summary for crash /\\n   * health_monitor closes (process dying) and falls back to truncation.\\n   */\\n  private async archiveOnClose(s: ChatSession, closeReason: SessionArchive[\\\"closeReason\\\"]) {\\n    const assistantChars = s.history.reduce(\\n      (n, h) => (h.role === \\\"assistant\\\" ? n + h.text.length : n),\\n      0,\\n    );\\n    const substantive = s.history.length >= config.archiveMinTurns && assistantChars > 0;\\n    try {\\n      if (substantive) {\\n        await saveArchive(await exportSession(s, closeReason));\\n      } else if (s.priorArchive) {\\n        // Trivial close — keep the prior, more-substantive archive.\\n        await saveArchive(s.priorArchive);\\n        console.log(`[archive] chat ${s.chatId}: trivial close (${s.history.length} turns), carried prior archive forward`);\\n      } else if (s.history.length > 0) {\\n        // No prior to fall back to — persist what little we have.\\n        await saveArchive(await exportSession(s, closeReason));\\n      }\\n    } catch (e) {\\n      console.error(`[session ${s.chatId}] archive failed:`, e);\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  async drop(chatId: number, closeReason: \\\"manual\\\" | \\\"reset\\\" | \\\"restart\\\" | \\\"agent_switch\\\" = \\\"manual\\\") {\\n    const s = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (!s) return;\\n    this.sessions.delete(chatId);\\n    // manual/reset/restart/agent_switch 都是「要新 context」的明確意圖 →\\n    // 清 resume 記錄。idle/crash/health_monitor 不走 drop()，記錄保留。\\n    if (config.acpSessionResume) {\\n      await clearResumable(chatId).catch(() => {});\\n    }\\n    // Archive session state before closing (summary + trivial carry-forward)\\n    if (s.history.length > 0 || s.priorArchive) {\\n      await this.archiveOnClose(s, closeReason);\\n    }\\n    if (this.onBeforeClose) {\\n      try { await this.onBeforeClose(s); } catch (e) {\\n        console.error(`[session ${chatId}] onBeforeClose failed:`, e);\\n      }\\n    }\\n    await s.client.close();\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Park — 暫停 session（/session 切換用）：關 subprocess、record 保留，\\n   * 之後可 session/load 切回。與 drop() 對照：drop = fresh 意圖（清 active\\n   * record + archive + onBeforeClose 全套收尾），park 刻意都不做——\\n   * onBeforeClose 含 writeWorkingState(\\\"session closed\\\") + saveArchive，\\n   * archive 會被下次 create 消費刪除且 resume 路徑直接丟棄（純汙染）。\\n   * 但單獨存 transcript（fire-and-forget），讓 parked 段落仍進 memory\\n   * extraction 素材。無活 session 時 no-op（idle sweep 已收掉的場景）。\\n   */\\n  async park(chatId: number): Promise<void> {\\n    const s = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (!s) return;\\n    // 先移出 map：provider exit handler 以 map 內容判斷是否 unexpected\\n    this.sessions.delete(chatId);\\n    logEvent(\\\"session_end\\\", { reason: \\\"park\\\" }, { chatId, userId: s.userId });\\n    if (s.history.length > 0) {\\n      // dynamic import 防 sessionManager ⇄ session-extract 循環依賴\\n      import(\\\"./session-extract.js\\\")\\n        .then((m) => m.saveTranscript(s))\\n        .catch((e) => console.warn(`[session ${chatId}] park transcript failed:`, e));\\n    }\\n    await s.client.close();\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * /session 切換：park 現行 → setActive → create()（resolveResumeCandidate\\n   * 自然命中新 active，走 session/load 恢復目標 context）。\\n   * 順序防呆：① 目標先驗證存在（read-only，不存在時現行 session 不受影響）\\n   * ② store 寫入（setActive）必須在 park 成功之後——反過來的話 park 失敗\\n   * 會留下「store 指 target、map 還是舊 session」的 divergence。\\n   * create 失敗則 map 無 session、active 已指 target → 下一則訊息 get() 自癒。\\n   */\\n  async switchSession(chatId: number, targetId: string, userId?: number): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const { activeId, sessions: records } = await listSessions(chatId);\\n    const target = records.find((r) => r.id === targetId);\\n    if (!target) {\\n      throw new Error(`找不到 session ${targetId}（可能已被移除），請重開 /session 列表`);\\n    }\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing?.inflight) {\\n      throw new Error(\\\"目前有 turn 進行中，請等它完成或先 /cancel 再切換\\\");\\n    }\\n    if (targetId === activeId && existing && !existing.client.isClosed) {\\n      return existing; // 已是 active 且進程活著：no-op\\n    }\\n    if (existing) {\\n      await this.park(chatId);\\n    }\\n    await setActive(chatId, targetId);\\n    // BC-8：record 綁定的 backend 與 pin 對齊，否則 resolveResumeCandidate\\n    // 的 backendKey 防呆會拒絕 resume 而靜默走 fresh。\\n    if (target.backendKey) {\\n      this.acpBackendByChat.set(chatId, target.backendKey);\\n    } else {\\n      this.acpBackendByChat.delete(chatId);\\n    }\\n    savePinnedAgents(this.acpBackendByChat).catch((err) =>\\n      console.warn(`[session ${chatId}] failed to persist pinned agent:`, err),\\n    );\\n    return this.create(chatId, userId, \\\"acp\\\");\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * /session new：park 現行 + 全新 session（新 sessionId、完整新 preamble）。\\n   * parked records 全保留（clearActive 只清指標）。\\n   */\\n  async newSession(chatId: number, userId?: number, name?: string): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing?.inflight) {\\n      throw new Error(\\\"目前有 turn 進行中，請等它完成或先 /cancel 再開新對話\\\");\\n    }\\n    const { sessions: records } = await listSessions(chatId);\\n    if (records.length >= MAX_SESSIONS_PER_CHAT) {\\n      throw new Error(`已達 session 上限（${MAX_SESSIONS_PER_CHAT}），請先用 /session close 關閉不用的對話`);\\n    }\\n    if (existing) {\\n      await this.park(chatId);\\n    }\\n    await clearActive(chatId);\\n    const session = await this.create(chatId, userId, \\\"acp\\\");\\n    if (name) {\\n      // create() 內 saveResumable 已建立新 active record，直接命名\\n      const { activeId } = await listSessions(chatId);\\n      if (activeId) {\\n        await renameSession(chatId, activeId, name);\\n      }\\n    }\\n    return session;\\n  }\\n\\n  private async sweepIdle() {\\n    const now = Date.now();\\n    for (const [chatId, s] of this.sessions) {\\n      // --- Runtime Health Monitor ---\\n      // Detect subprocess that silently died (pid no longer valid) but\\n      // exit event hasn't fired yet (possible on Windows when parent shell\\n      // exits but Node doesn't see the signal).\\n      const clientPid = \\\"pid\\\" in s.client ? (s.client as { pid?: number }).pid : undefined;\\n      if (!s.client.isClosed && clientPid !== undefined) {\\n        try {\\n          // process.kill(pid, 0) throws if pid doesn't exist — non-destructive probe\\n          process.kill(clientPid, 0);\\n        } catch {\\n          // Process is gone but client didn't fire exit event\\n          console.error(`[health] chat ${chatId}: ACP subprocess (pid=${clientPid}) is dead, forcing cleanup`);\\n          logEvent(\\\"session_end\\\", { reason: \\\"health_monitor_dead_process\\\" }, { chatId, userId: s.userId });\\n          this.sessions.delete(chatId);\\n          // Preserve context: archive what streamed, or carry the prior archive\\n          // forward (it was already deleted from disk when this session started).\\n          if (s.history.length > 0 || s.priorArchive) {\\n            await this.archiveOnClose(s, \\\"health_monitor\\\");\\n          }\\n          s.client.close().catch(() => {});\\n          if (this.onUnexpectedExit) {\\n            this.onUnexpectedExit(s, null).catch((e) =>\\n              console.error(`[health ${chatId}] onUnexpectedExit failed:`, e),\\n            );\\n          }\\n          continue; // skip idle check for this session\\n        }\\n      }\\n\\n      // --- Idle timeout sweep ---\\n      if (now - s.lastUsed > config.sessionIdleMs) {\\n        console.log(`[session] dropping idle chat ${chatId}`);\\n        this.sessions.delete(chatId);\\n        // Archive session state before closing (summary + trivial carry-forward)\\n        if (s.history.length > 0 || s.priorArchive) {\\n          await this.archiveOnClose(s, \\\"idle\\\");\\n        }\\n        if (this.onBeforeClose) {\\n          try { await this.onBeforeClose(s); } catch (e) {\\n            console.error(`[session ${chatId}] onBeforeClose failed:`, e);\\n          }\\n        }\\n        s.client.close().catch(() => {});\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * @param opts.clearResume 只有「明確 fresh 意圖」的關閉（/restart、<<RESTART>>）\\n   *   才清 resume registry（BC-3）。SIGINT/SIGTERM 等訊號關閉不傳 → 預設保留，\\n   *   下次啟動可 session/load 恢復（BC-2 的「bridge 重開」場景）。\\n   */\\n  async shutdown(opts?: { clearResume?: boolean }) {\\n    clearInterval(this.sweeper);\\n    const all = Array.from(this.sessions.values());\\n    this.sessions.clear();\\n    console.log(`[session] shutdown: flushing ${all.length} session(s)`);\\n    if (config.acpSessionResume && opts?.clearResume) {\\n      for (const s of all) {\\n        await clearResumable(s.chatId).catch(() => {});\\n      }\\n    }\\n    // Archive all sessions before closing (summary + trivial carry-forward)\\n    for (const s of all) {\\n      if (!s.client.isClosed && (s.history.length > 0 || s.priorArchive)) {\\n        await this.archiveOnClose(s, \\\"restart\\\");\\n      }\\n    }\\n    if (this.onBeforeClose) {\\n      for (const s of all) {\\n        if (s.client.isClosed) {\\n          console.log(`[session] shutdown: skipping already-closed chat ${s.chatId}`);\\n          continue;\\n        }\\n        console.log(`[session] shutdown: running onBeforeClose for chat ${s.chatId} (history=${s.history.length})`);\\n        try { await this.onBeforeClose(s); } catch (e) {\\n          console.error(`[session ${s.chatId}] onBeforeClose failed:`, e);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n    await Promise.all(all.map((s) => s.client.isClosed ? Promise.resolve() : s.client.close()));\\n    console.log(`[session] shutdown: done`);\\n  }\\n}\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":273,\"oldLines\":8,\"newStart\":273,\"newLines\":14,\"lines\":[\"    * precedingTools。僅在 tool_call case 維護一處 push；resetTurn 推入 TURN_MARKER 不清空。\",\"    */\",\"   _recentToolNames?: string[];\",\"-  /** Internal: set true when cancel() fires; run-prompt finally skips post-processing. */\",\"+  /** Internal: set true when cancel() fires; run-prompt 據此跳過被取消 turn 的收尾。 */\",\"   _cancelledTurn?: boolean;\",\"+  /**\",\"+   * Internal: 單調遞增的 turn 序號。runPrompt 起手時 +1 並持有快照；\",\"+   * prompt() resolve 後若序號已不符（新 turn 接管）或 _cancelledTurn 為真，\",\"+   * 舊 turn 跳過所有收尾且不得覆寫 onUpdate/inflight（那些已屬於新 turn）。\",\"+   */\",\"+  _turnSeq?: number;\",\"   /** Internal: message_id of the current turn's placeholder (for cancel UI feedback). */\",\"   _placeholderMsgId?: number;\",\"   /** Internal: true once the 70% context budget warning has been injected this session. */\"]}],\"userModified\":false,\"replaceAll\":false}"</outcome>

content.thinking:
This edit is adding a new `_turnSeq` field to the ChatSession interface. The comment explains it's a monotonically increasing turn sequence number. When runPrompt starts, it increments this and holds a snapshot. After prompt() resolves, if the sequence number no longer matches (new turn has taken over) or _cancelledTurn is true, the old turn skips all cleanup and must not overwrite onUpdate/inflight (those belong to the new turn).

This is a turn sequence number approach to solving the race condition - a more robust fix than just checking _cancelledTurn. It allows the finally block to detect if the session has been reused by a new turn even if cancellation wasn't explicitly called.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Added turn sequence number to detect turn takeover</title>
  <subtitle>New _turnSeq field enables detecting when session has been reused by new turn during old turn's completion</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>sessionManager.ts lines 277-283 add _turnSeq optional number field to ChatSession interface with detailed documentation</fact>
    <fact>Turn sequence is monotonically increasing, runPrompt increments it at start and holds a snapshot of the value</fact>
    <fact>After prompt() resolves, old turn checks if sequence number still matches to detect if new turn has taken over the session</fact>
    <fact>Old turn skips cleanup and must not overwrite onUpdate/inflight when sequence mismatch detected or _cancelledTurn is true</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Second step of fixing the cancelled turn race condition. A new _turnSeq field is added to ChatSession as a monotonically increasing turn sequence number. The design is that when runPrompt starts a new turn, it will increment session._turnSeq and capture the value as a local variable. When the old turn's prompt() call eventually completes and reaches its finally block, it compares its captured sequence number against the current session._turnSeq. If they don't match, it means a new turn has started and taken over the session during the old turn's execution, so the old turn must skip all cleanup operations that would mutate shared session state (clearing onUpdate, setting inflight=false, etc). This provides a robust detection mechanism for turn takeover that works even without explicit cancellation - for example if the old turn just completes very slowly. Combined with the _cancelledTurn flag check, this gives two layers of protection against cross-turn state pollution.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/sessionManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

If the file doesn't\\n    // exist or is corrupt we just start fresh (same as before).\\n    loadPinnedAgents().then((map) => {\\n      for (const [k, v] of map) {\\n        if (!this.acpBackendByChat.has(k)) this.acpBackendByChat.set(k, v);\\n      }\\n    }).catch(() => {});\\n  }\\n\\n  async get(chatId: number, userId?: number): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing && !existing.client.isClosed) {\\n      existing.lastUsed = Date.now();\\n      return existing;\\n    }\\n    return this.create(chatId, userId);\\n  }\\n\\n  private async create(chatId: number, userId?: number, providerType?: ProviderType): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    // Inject TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID so MCP children (mcp-memory) know whose\\n    // facts file to write. MEMORY_DIR is passed through too so the mcp\\n    // server doesn't need to re-read .env.\\n    const env: Record<string, string> = { MEMORY_DIR: config.memoryDir };\\n    if (userId) env.TG_ACTIVE_USER_ID = String(userId);\\n\\n    const activeType = providerType ?? config.defaultProvider;\\n\\n    // Resolve the pinned ACP backend (/agent). Looked up on EVERY create —\\n    // including crash-recreates via get() — so the chosen backend sticks.\\n    let backend: AcpBackendDef | undefined;\\n    if (activeType === \\\"acp\\\") {\\n      const key = this.acpBackendByChat.get(chatId);\\n      if (key) {\\n        backend = loadAcpProviders()[key];\\n        if (!backend) {\\n          console.warn(\\n            `[session ${chatId}] pinned ACP backend \\\"${key}\\\" not in acp-providers.json — falling back to .env agent`,\\n          );\\n          this.acpBackendByChat.delete(chatId);\\n          savePinnedAgents(this.acpBackendByChat).catch(() => {});\\n        }\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    const facts = userId ? await loadFacts(userId) : \\\"\\\";\\n\\n    // Try to compress recent facts via local LLM (graceful fallback if unavailable)\\n    let compressed: string | null = null;\\n    if (facts && activeType !== \\\"local\\\") {\\n      const lines = facts.split(/\\\\r?\\\\n/).filter(l => l.trim().length > 0);\\n      const tail = config.memoryPreambleTail;\\n      if (lines.length > tail) {\\n        const { compressFactsForPreamble: compress } = await import(\\\"./local-llm.js\\\");\\n        compressed = await compress(lines.slice(-tail));\\n      }\\n    }\\n    const breakdown = activeType === \\\"local\\\"\\n      ? buildLocalPreamble(facts, userId)\\n      : buildPreambleWithBreakdown(facts, userId, { compressed, agentCommand: backend?.command });\\n\\n    // Inject working-state from previous session if available (one-shot).\\n    const wsPath = path.join(config.memoryDir, `working-state-${chatId}.md`);\\n    let workingStateBlock = \\\"\\\";\\n    try {\\n      const ws = await readFile(wsPath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n      workingStateBlock =\\n        \\\"\\\\n[Previous session working state — use as context to resume work]\\\\n\\\" +\\n        ws +\\n        \\\"\\\\nResume from `next_action` above. Do not ask what was done last time.\\\\n\\\" +\\n        \\\"[End working state]\\\\n\\\\n\\\";\\n      await unlink(wsPath);\\n      console.log(`[session] injected working-state for chat ${chatId}`);\\n    } catch { /* file doesn't exist — normal */ }\\n\\n    // Inject structured session archive restoration (complements working-state\\n    // with turn-level context, goal state, and session stats).\\n    let archiveBlock = \\\"\\\";\\n    let priorArchive: SessionArchive | undefined;\\n    try {\\n      const { loadArchive, buildRestorationBlock, deleteArchive, isArchiveStale } = await import(\\\"./session-archive.js\\\");\\n      const archive = await loadArchive(chatId);\\n      if (archive) {\\n        if (isArchiveStale(archive, config.archiveMaxAgeHours, Date.now())) {\\n          const ageH = Math.round((Date.now() - new Date(archive.archivedAt).getTime()) / 3600_000);\\n          // Too old to be a useful handoff. await deleteArchive(chatId);\\n          console.log(`[session] discarded stale archive for chat ${chatId} (age ${ageH}h > ${config.archiveMaxAgeHours}h)`);\\n        } else {\\n          archiveBlock = \\\"\\\\n\\\" + buildRestorationBlock(archive) + \\\"\\\\n\\\\n\\\";\\n          await deleteArchive(chatId);\\n          priorArchive = archive; // stash for trivial-session carry-forward on close\\n          console.log(`[session] injected session archive for chat ${chatId} (${archive.stats.turnCount} turns, closed=${archive.closeReason})`);\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.error(`[session] loadArchive failed for chat ${chatId}:`, (err as Error).message);\\n    }\\n\\n    // Inject pending dream suggestions (High Priority from last /dream run).\\n    // Read-only：STATE.md 由 dream 每晚重寫，這裡不刪。48h 新鮮度閘門防止\\n    // 注入陳年建議。Frozen-snapshot 合規：只在 create() 組一次，隨 preamble 凍結。\\n    let dreamStateBlock = \\\"\\\";\\n    try {\\n      const { hp.lastRun.getTime() < 48 * 3600_000;\\n      if (hp && fresh && hp.items.length > 0) {\\n        dreamStateBlock =\\n          \\\"\\\\n[Pending dream suggestions — 上次 /dream 維運的 High Priority 待辦]\\\\n\\\" +\\n          hp.items.map((it) => `- ${it}`).join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") +\\n          \\\"\\\\n當使用者說「處理建議」「dream 建議」或類似語句時，即指上述項目。\\\\n\\\" +\\n          `完整三層清單（含 Watch List）在 ${loopStatePath()}。處理完某項後，更新該檔移除或標記已處理。\\\\n` +\\n          \\\"[End pending dream suggestions]\\\\n\\\\n\\\";\\n        console.log(`[session] injected ${hp.items.length} pending dream suggestion(s) for chat ${chatId}`);\\n      }\\n    } catch { /* fail-open：STATE.md 缺失或格式不符不影響 session 建立 */ }\\n\\n    const relayTaskBlock = await formatActiveRelayTasksForPreamble(chatId);\\n    const session.resumed = true;\\n      console.log(`[session ${chatId}] resumed ACP session ${session.sessionId}`);\\n    }\\n    // Registry 生命週期：flag on 時記錄本 session（bridge 整個 crash 也能恢復）\\n    if session;\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Factory: create the right Provider based on type. */\\n  private createProvider(type: ProviderType, env: Record<string, string>, systemPrompt?: string, backend?: [\\\"memory\\\", \\\"notebooklm\\\", \\\"google\\\"] : undefined,\\n    });\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Switch the active provider for a chat. Closes the old session and\\n   * creates a new one with the specified provider type.\\n   * Returns the new session.\\n   */\\n  async switchProvider(chatId: number, type: ProviderType, userId?: number): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing) {\\n      this.sessions.delete(chatId);\\n      await existing.client.close().catch(() => {});\\n    }\\n    return this.create(chatId, userId, type);\\n  }\\n\\n  /**\\n   * Switch the ACP backend for a chat (/agent) with conversation handoff.\\n   * Reuses the full drop() close pipeline — archiveOnClose (substantive\\n   * guard + priorArchive carry-forward + LLM summary), onBeforeClose\\n   * (transcript + working-state) — so the new session's create() finds the\\n   * archive on disk and injects the handoff context into its preamble.\\n   * Throws when the backend key is unknown or a turn is in flight.\\n   */\\n  async switchAgent(chatId: number, backendKey: string, userId?: number): Promise<ChatSession> {\\n    const def = loadAcpProviders()[backendKey];\\n    if (!def) {\\n      throw new Error(`未知的 agent \\\"${backendKey}\\\"（不在 acp-providers.json）`);\\n    }\\n    const existing = this.sessions.get(chatId);\\n    if (existing?.inflight) {\\n      throw new Error(\\\"目前有 turn 進行中，請等它完成或先 /cancel 再切換\\\");\\n    }\\n    if (existing) {\\n      await this.drop(chatId, \\\"agent_switch\\\");\\n    }\\n    this.acpBackendByChat.set(chatId, backendKey);\\n    savePinnedAgents(this.acpBackendByChat).catch((err) =>\\n      console.warn(`[session ${chatId}] failed to persist pinned agent:`, err),\\n    );\\n    return this.create(chatId, userId, \\\"acp\\\");\\n  }\\n\\n  /** Start (or restart) the inactivity timer for a turn. */\\n  startInactivityTimer(session: ChatSession) {\\n    this.clearInactivityTimer(session);\\n    const ms = session._toolInFlight && config.turnToolInactivityTimeoutMs > 0\\n      ? config.turnToolInactivityTimeoutMs\\n      : config.turnInactivityTimeoutMs;\\n    if (ms <= 0) return;\\n    session._inactivityTimer = setTimeout(() => {\\n      console.warn(\\n        `[session ${session.chatId}] turn inactivity timeout (${ms}ms, toolInFlight=${!!session._toolInFlight}) — auto-cancelling`,\\n      );\\n      session.client.cancel();\\n    }, ms);\\n    session._inactivityTimer.unref?.();\\n  }\\n\\n  private resetInactivityTimer(session: ChatSession) {\\n    if (!session._inactivityTimer) return;\\n    this.startInactivityTimer(session);\\n  }\\n\\n  clearInactivityTimer(session: ChatSession) {\\n    if (session._inactivityTimer) {\\n      clearTimeout(session._inactivityTimer);\\n      session._inactivityTimer = undefined;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  private applyUpdate(session: ChatSession, u: SessionUpdate) {\\n    this.resetInactivityTimer(session);\\n    const up = u.update;\\n    // Opportunistically capture usage-like meta the agent may attach.\\n    const meta = (up as { _meta?: Record<string, unknown> })._meta;\\n    const usage =\\n      (meta?.usage as Record<string, unknown> | undefined) ??\\n      ((up as { usage?: Record<string, unknown> }).usage);\\n    if (usage && typeof usage === \\\"object\\\") {\\n      session.usage = usage;\\n    }\\n    switch (up.sessionUpdate) {\\n      case \\\"agent_message_chunk\\\":\\n      case \\\"agent_thought_chunk\\\": {\\n        const content = up.content as { type?: string; text?: string } | undefined;\\n        if (content?.type === \\\"text\\\" && typeof content.text === \\\"string\\\") {\\n          // Orphan turn: a message chunk arrived with no prompt turn in-flight\\n          // (typically a background sub-agent completion re-invoking the agent\\n          // via task-notification). content.thinking:
This is a significant bug fix. The observation shows that a new `creating` map was added to track in-progress session creation promises, and the `get()` method was updated to deduplicate concurrent calls to `create()`.

The problem being fixed: when multiple concurrent calls to `get()` happen (from message handler, ASK callback, specialist background injection, etc.), each would call `create()` which spawns an ACP subprocess. The second create would overwrite the first one's map entry, causing the first subprocess to leak (its exit handler's identity comparison would always be false since it's checking if the session in the map matches the one it knows about, but the map now has the second session).

The solution: Track pending create() promises in a separate `creating` map. When get() is called, if there's already a pending create() for that chatId, return that promise instead of starting a new one. After the promise settles, clean it up from the creating map using compare-and-delete pattern to avoid deleting a newer create that might have started.

This is fixing the second high-severity bug from the code review - the concurrent get() spawning duplicate ACP subprocesses.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>bugfix</type>
  <title>Deduplicate concurrent session creation to prevent subprocess leaks</title>
  <subtitle>Added creating map to track in-progress create promises, preventing duplicate ACP subprocess spawns from concurrent get calls</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>sessionManager.ts line 356 adds private creating map to track per-chat in-progress create() promises</fact>
    <fact>Lines 363-373 updated get() method to check creating map and return pending promise if create already in progress for chatId</fact>
    <fact>Create promise registered in creating map before starting, cleaned up with compare-and-delete pattern after settling</fact>
    <fact>Compare-and-delete only removes entry if map still contains same promise instance, avoiding race with subsequent create rounds</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Fix for the concurrent get() subprocess leak bug identified in code review. The create() method contains multiple second-scale awaits (loadFacts, preamble compression, subprocess spawn), creating a wide window where concurrent get() calls from message handler, ASK callbacks, or specialist background injection can race. Previously, both would call create() and spawn separate ACP subprocesses, with the second overwriting the first's map entry. The first subprocess's exit handler would then fail its identity check (sessions.get(chatId) === session returns false) and never clean up, leaking the subprocess. The fix adds a creating map to track in-progress creation promises per chatId. When get() finds a pending create, it returns that promise instead of starting a new one. After the promise settles, a finally handler removes it from the map using compare-and-delete pattern - only deleting if the map entry still points to the same promise instance, preventing premature cleanup if another create started in the meantime. The catch on the cleanup chain swallows its own errors since the caller's await will handle the actual rejection.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/sessionManager.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
This is a critical edit in the bugfix process. The user is implementing the turn ownership token mechanism in run-prompt.ts:

1. After setting `session.inflight = true` and calling `sessions.resetTurn(session)`
2. They increment `session._turnSeq` (or initialize to 1 if undefined)
3. They capture the current turn sequence number in a local variable `turnToken`
4. They define a helper function `turnSuperseded()` that returns true if either:
   - The turn was explicitly cancelled (_cancelledTurn === true), OR
   - The turn sequence number has changed (meaning a new turn has taken over)

This is the implementation of the turn ownership tracking mechanism that was designed earlier. The next step will be to use `turnSuperseded()` to guard cleanup operations in the finally block and after prompt() completes.

This is a key part of the fix for the race condition where a cancelled turn's finally block would interfere with a new turn's state.

<observation>
  <type>feature</type>
  <title>Implemented turn ownership token in run-prompt</title>
  <subtitle>Added turnToken snapshot and turnSuperseded guard to detect when turn has been cancelled or superseded by new turn</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>run-prompt.ts lines 354-360 increment session._turnSeq at turn start and capture value in local turnToken variable</fact>
    <fact>Line 357 defines turnSuperseded() helper function checking both _cancelledTurn flag and sequence number mismatch</fact>
    <fact>Turn ownership check returns true if _cancelledTurn is true OR if session._turnSeq differs from captured turnToken</fact>
    <fact>Mechanism allows old turn to detect it has been superseded by new turn that took over shared session state</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Implementation of the turn ownership detection mechanism in runPrompt. After setting inflight=true and calling resetTurn, the code now increments session._turnSeq (initializing to 1 if undefined) and captures the current value in a local variable turnToken. A helper function turnSuperseded() is defined that returns true when either the turn was explicitly cancelled (_cancelledTurn === true) or when the sequence number has changed (session._turnSeq !== turnToken), indicating a new turn has taken over. This provides the guard condition that will be used in the finally block and post-prompt cleanup logic to prevent old turns from mutating session state that now belongs to a new turn. The turnSuperseded check will allow the finally block to safely skip cleanup operations (clearing onUpdate, setting inflight=false, draining pending queue) when the turn no longer owns the session, preventing the cross-turn state pollution that was causing cancelled turns to kill new turns' streaming.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
    <concept>pattern</concept>
  </concepts>

  </files_read>

    <file>src/run-prompt.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

content.thinking:
The user is showing me more code being read and edited. Let me track what's happening:

1. They just added a turnSuperseded guard right after turnFinalized = true
2. This guard checks if the turn was cancelled or superseded
3. If so, it logs and returns early, skipping all the post-processing (final render, token side effects, history push)
4. This prevents the cancelled turn from using the new turn's shared buffer/toolTimeline to send wrong messages

This is the critical guard that prevents the race condition bug. Now they're reading lines around line 1600, which appears to be in the error handling section.

Let me create an observation for this change.

content.text:
```xml
<observation>
  <type>bugfix</type>
  <title>Added superseded guard after prompt completion to skip post-processing</title>
  <subtitle>Turn now checks turnSuperseded after prompt returns and exits early if cancelled or overtaken by new turn</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>run-prompt.ts lines 613-621 add turnSuperseded check immediately after setting turnFinalized=true and before any post-processing</fact>
    <fact>If turnSuperseded returns true, code logs cancellation/supersession event with stopReason and returns early</fact>
    <fact>Early return skips final render, token side effects (relay/schedule/file send), history push, and all Telegram message delivery</fact>
    <fact>Comment explains guard prevents cancelled old turn from using new turn's shared buffer/toolTimeline to send wrong messages</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Critical guard implementation to fix the cancelled turn race condition. Immediately after the prompt() call completes and turnFinalized is set to true, the code now checks turnSuperseded() before proceeding with any post-processing. If the check returns true (either because _cancelledTurn flag is set or the sequence number changed), the turn logs the cancellation/supersession event and returns early, completely skipping all subsequent work. This prevents the massive post-processing block - hundreds of lines covering final message rendering, token extraction (relay/delegate/result), goal bookkeeping, schedule registration, file delivery, sticker sending, specialist dispatch, and Telegram message delivery - from executing using shared session state that now belongs to a new turn. Without this guard, a cancelled turn that completes late would read session.buffer (containing the new turn's streaming output), extract tokens from it, and send those to Telegram, causing the new turn's partial content to be delivered twice or relay tokens meant for the new turn to fire prematurely.</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>what-changed</concept>
    <concept>problem-solution</concept>
    <concept>how-it-works</concept>
  </concepts>
  <files_read>
    <file>src/run-prompt.ts</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>src/run-prompt.ts</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>

  const fakeCtx = {\\n      chat: { id: chatId, type: \\\"private\\\" as const },\\n      replyWithPhoto: (f: unknown, extra?: unknown) => bot.api.sendPhoto(chatId, f as any, extra as any),\\n const fileId = STICKER_MAP[emotion];\\n    if (!fileId) continue;\\n    try {\\n      await bot.api.sendSticker(chatId, fileId);\\n    } catch (err) {\\n      console.warn(`[orphan ${chatId}] sticker - Bug #2: Concurrent get() calls spawn duplicate ACP subprocesses that leak because create() has no in-progress deduplication

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested a code review of the bridge program in Chinese: "幫我檢視bridge的程式是否有問題" (Help me review the bridge code for issues). Following the review which found 25 issues, the primary session immediately began fixing the two high-severity confirmed bugs without explicit user instruction to do so.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - Turn ownership and lifecycle management in concurrent async contexts
   - Race conditions between cancelled and new turns sharing session state
   - Monotonic sequence numbers for detecting turn takeover
   - Promise deduplication pattern for preventing duplicate resource allocation
   - Compare-and-delete cleanup pattern
   - Dead code/unused flags in cancellation logic
   - Subprocess lifecycle and memory leaks
   - Session state pollution across turn boundaries

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - src/sessionManager.ts (lines 250-880):
     - Added _cancelledTurn reset in resetTurn() method (line 827)
     - Added _turnSeq field to ChatSession interface (lines 277-283) with documentation explaining turn ownership detection
     - Added creating map to SessionManager class (line 356) for tracking in-progress create() promises
     - Modified get() method (lines 359-373) to check for pending create() and return existing promise, preventing duplicate subprocess spawns
     - Used compare-and-delete pattern in finally handler to safely cleanup creating map entries
   
   - src/run-prompt.ts:
     - Implemented turn ownership token (lines 354-360):
       ```typescript
       session._turnSeq = (session._turnSeq ?? 0) + 1;
       const turnToken = session._turnSeq;
       const turnSuperseded = () =>
         session._cancelledTurn === true || session._turnSeq !== turnToken;
       ```
     - Added early-return guard after prompt() completes (lines 613-621):
       ```typescript
       if (turnSuperseded()) {
         console.log(
           `[chat ${chatId}] turn cancelled/superseded (stopReason=${stopReason ?? "unknown"}) — skipping post-processing`,
         );
         return;
       }
       ```

4. Errors and fixes:
   - Bug #1 - Cancelled turn race condition:
     - Problem: _cancelledTurn flag was declared and set to true in cancel() but never checked anywhere, allowing cancelled turn's finally block to execute and pollute new turn's state
     - Root cause: Local turnFinalized variable provides no protection against cross-turn interference since each runPrompt() call has its own local copy
     - Fix implemented in 3 parts:
       1. Reset _cancelledTurn=false in resetTurn()
       2. Add monotonic _turnSeq to detect when session has been taken over
       3. Add turnSuperseded() guard that returns early before post-processing
   
   - Bug #2 - Concurrent subprocess leak:
     - Problem: create() method contains multiple second-scale awaits (loadFacts, preamble compression, subprocess spawn), allowing concurrent get() calls to each spawn ACP subprocesses. Second subprocess overwrites first in sessions map, causing first subprocess's exit handler identity check to fail, leaking the process
     - Fix: Added creating map to track in-progress promises per chatId, with get() returning pending promise if exists, preventing duplicate create() calls

5. Problem Solving:
   Fixed two critical concurrency bugs in the bridge's session management:
   - Implemented turn sequence numbering to detect when a turn has been superseded by a new turn taking over the session
   - Implemented promise deduplication to prevent resource leaks from concurrent session creation
   - Both fixes use defensive programming patterns to handle race conditions in async concurrent code

6. All user messages:
   - "幫我檢視bridge的程式是否有問題" (Help me review the bridge code for issues)

7. Pending Tasks:
   - None explicitly requested. The code review identified 23 additional findings (8 medium, 12 low severity) that could be addressed, but user did not explicitly request fixes for those.

8. Current Work:
   Just completed implementing the turnSuperseded() guard in run-prompt.ts after the prompt() completes. This was the final piece of the fix for Bug #1 (cancelled turn race condition). The guard checks both _cancelledTurn flag and sequence number mismatch to detect if the turn should skip post-processing. The implementation adds an early return at line 613-621 in run-prompt.ts, immediately after setting turnFinalized=true and before any post-processing logic (history push, token extraction, message delivery, etc.) executes.

9. Optional Next Step:
   The fixes for both high-severity bugs appear complete. The finally block in run-prompt.ts (around line 1668) should also be updated to check turnSuperseded() before clearing session.onUpdate and setting session.inflight=false, to prevent the cancelled turn's finally block from clearing state that now belongs to the new turn. However, this was not explicitly in progress in the most recent messages, so confirmation from the user would be appropriate before proceeding.

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\projects\C--Users-jiunchiwang--claude-mem-observer-sessions\19bf6e91-5d47-4430-932e-846c593191fd.jsonl
Continue the conversation from where it left off without asking the user any further questions. Resume directly — do not acknowledge the summary, do not recap what was happening, do not preface with "I'll continue" or similar. Pick up the last task as if the break never happened.

content.thinking:
The primary session just made two more critical edits to complete the fix for Bug #1 (the cancelled turn race condition):

1. **First edit (lines 1631-1639)**: Added a turnSuperseded() guard in the catch block. If the turn has been cancelled or superseded (detected via the turnToken check), it suppresses error delivery entirely and returns early. This prevents a cancelled turn from showing error messages to the user using UI state (placeholder) that may already belong to the new turn.

2. **Second edit (lines 1691-1700)**: Added a turnSuperseded() guard in the finally block before clearing shared session state. The finally block was unconditionally clearing session.onUpdate, session.inflight, and calling clearInactivityTimer + draining the meta queue. If a cancelled old turn's finally block ran after a new turn had already started, it would:
   - Clear the new turn's onUpdate callback → kill streaming
   - Set inflight=false while new turn is active → break the concurrency gate
   - Clear the new turn's inactivity timer
   - Potentially drain meta prompts that belong to the new turn

The fix wraps the cleanup in `if (session._turnSeq === turnToken)` - only the turn that currently owns the session (same sequence number) is allowed to clean up. A superseded old turn's finally will still run (clearing local timers like editTimer and draftKeepalive), but it won't touch the shared session state.

This completes the comprehensive fix for Bug #1. The guards are now in place at three critical points:
1. After prompt() completes (skip post-processing)
2. In the catch block (suppress error delivery)
3. In the finally block (skip shared state cleanup)

All three use the same turnSuperseded() function which checks both _cancelledTurn flag and _turnSeq !== turnToken.

Let me write an observation capturing these two final pieces.

  <type>bugfix</type>
  <title>Added turnSuperseded guards in catch and finally blocks to complete race condition fix</title>
  <subtitle>Cancelled turns now skip error delivery and shared state cleanup, preventing interference with new turn</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>run-prompt.ts lines 1631-1639 add turnSuperseded check in catch block before error delivery</fact>
    <fact>If turn cancelled/superseded, logs suppression message and returns early without showing error to user</fact>
    <fact>Prevents cancelled turn from editing placeholder that may now belong to new turn</fact>
    <fact>run-prompt.ts lines 1691-1700 wrap finally block's shared state cleanup in turnToken ownership check</fact>
    <fact>Only turns with matching _turnSeq are allowed to clear session.onUpdate, session.inflight, inactivity timer, and meta queue</fact>
    <fact>Superseded turn's finally still clears local resources (editTimer, draftKeepalive, recovery callback) but doesn't touch shared session state</fact>
    <fact>Without this guard, cancelled old turn's finally would kill new turn's streaming and break concurrency gate</fact>
  </facts>
  <narrative>Final two guards complete the comprehensive fix for Bug #1 (cancelled turn race condition). First, the catch block now checks turnSuperseded() before attempting any error delivery. If a cancelled turn's prompt() call rejects (e.g., "cancelled" or "agent exited" errors from the forced kill), the error handler no longer tries to show it to the user or touch UI state (placeholder) that may have been taken over by the new turn. Second, and most critically, the finally block's cleanup logic is now gated by turn ownership. Previously, finally unconditionally cleared session.onUpdate, set inflight=false, and called clearInactivityTimer — if a cancelled old turn's finally block ran after a new turn had started (which is guaranteed to happen since cancel() optimistically releases inflight), it would destroy the new turn's streaming callback, break the concurrency gate by setting inflight=false while the new turn is active, and clear timers/queues that belong to the new turn. The fix wraps all shared-state cleanup in `if (session._turnSeq === turnToken)` — only the turn that currently owns the session is allowed to mutate it. Superseded turns still clean up their own local resources (timers, callbacks) but leave shared session state untouched for the owner turn to manage.</narrative>

The fix for Bug #1 (cancelled turn race condition) is now complete and verified. The implementation includes:

**Three-part solution:**
1. **State reset** - `resetTurn()` clears `_cancelledTurn` flag (sessionManager.ts line 827)
2. **Turn ownership tracking** - `_turnSeq` monotonic counter + `turnToken` capture (run-prompt.ts lines 354-360)
3. **Three guards** preventing superseded turn interference:
   - **Post-processing guard** (lines 613-621) - Skip final render, token side-effects, history push
   - **Error suppression guard** (lines 1631-1639) - Don't show errors or touch UI from cancelled turns
   - **Finally cleanup guard** (line 1698) - Only clear shared state if still owner

The code is properly indented, type-checks successfully, and follows the defensive programming pattern established in the codebase. The primary session appears to be looking for test scripts to verify the fix works correctly in practice.

  <what_happened>PowerShell</what_happened>
  <occurred_at>2026-07-11T06:49:00.730Z</occurred_at>
  <working_directory>G:\AI\telegram-kiro-bridge-main</working_directory>
  <parameters>"{\"command\":\"git commit -m @'\\nfix(session): 取消 turn 收尾守衛 + 並發 get() 建立去重\\n\\nFinding #1: _cancelledTurn 原本零讀取者（斷鏈死旗標）。cancel() 樂觀釋放\\nsession 後，被取消 turn 的 prompt() 稍後 resolve 仍完整收尾——用新 turn 的\\n共享 buffer 做 final render、誤觸發 token 副作用、finally 覆寫新 turn 的\\nonUpdate/inflight。修法：turn 序號 token（_turnSeq）+ _cancelledTurn 雙條件，\\n三處守衛（resolve 後跳過收尾、catch 抑制錯誤投遞、finally 只在仍持有\\nsession 時清理共享欄位）；resetTurn 清旗標。\\n\\nFinding #2: 並發 get() 無 in-progress 去重，create() 內多個秒級 await，\\n兩個並發 create 各 spawn 一個 ACP 子進程，後者覆蓋前者 map entry，被覆蓋\\n者 exit handler 身份比對恆 false 永不清理 → 子進程洩漏。修法：per-chatId\\ncreating Map，並發呼叫共享同一個 create promise，settle 後 compare-and-delete。\\n\\n驗證：npx tsc --noEmit 通過；check-session-resume.mjs（ALL PASS）、\\ncheck-session-archive.mjs（46 passed, 0 failed）。\\n\\nCo-Authored-By: Claude Fable 5 <noreply@anthropic.com>\\nClaude-Session: https://claude.ai/code/session_015NRnSHa9WmgC92LR1K9k27\\n'@\",\"description\":\"Commit 兩個 fix\"}"</parameters>
  <outcome>"{\"stdout\":\"[sync-skills] 1 skill(s) updated in default-skills/\\n[main bf76ac3] fix(session): 取消 turn 收尾守衛 + 並發 get() 建立去重\\n 3 files changed, 118 insertions(+), 20 deletions(-)\",\"stderr\":\"\",\"interrupted\":false,\"isImage\":false,\"gitOperation\":{\"commit\":{\"sha\":\"bf76ac3\",\"kind\":\"committed\"}}}"</outcome>
</observed_from_primary_session>
